environment_prompt: Dim medieval castle corridor with stone walls and floor. Torch sconces on both walls cast flickering orange light. Stone arches span the ceiling. A heavy wooden door with iron reinforcements stands at the far end. A tattered red banner hangs on the left wall. Behind the viewer, the corridor extends further back with additional torch-lit stone arches, a side alcove with an old wooden bench, and a narrow staircase leading up to the ramparts.
perspective_prompt: First-person view through the knight's eyes, looking down the corridor toward the wooden door.

interactions.prompt: The view switches from first-person to third-person, pulling back to reveal a knight in full silver plate armor with a red cape and a longsword sheathed at the hip from behind.
The view switches back to first-person, returning to the character's own eyes.
